title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; stream chats, list models, etc.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); docker run once, connect to local Ollama.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama; sync/async APIs, Spring Boot starter available.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot CLI using Ollama; offers inline code suggestions in the terminal.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal SvelteKit web UI for chatting with Ollama; runs entirely in browser.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama; strongly typed, async tokio client for chat & embeddings.

title: ollama-chat
summary: React component library to embed an Ollama chat widget in any web app.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama; use local LLMs in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; mentions trigger streaming replies.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images & compose examples for CPU/GPU deployments of Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for Ollama.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python client on PyPI; install with pip install ollama.
